tiktok_script:
Hook: Here's a mindset shift that changes how you think about money — and it only takes about 60 seconds.

Beat 1: Most of us were taught to get one good job and protect it. And that made sense once. But in today's economy, one income stream means one point of failure. One layoff, one slow season, one unexpected bill — and there's nothing to catch you. That's not a scare tactic, that's just how single-stream finances work.

Beat 2: The fix isn't complicated — it's diversification. Not the Wall Street kind. The everyday kind. Building a second or third stream of income using digital tools, your existing knowledge, or skills you already have. People do this every day without a big audience, a tech background, or a huge time commitment.

Beat 3: The Passive Income Blueprint is a $17 self-paced resource that walks you through exactly how to approach this — step by step, on your own schedule. No subscription. No upsells. Costs less than dinner out and you keep it forever.

CTA: If Mindset Sunday means anything, let it mean this — one stream is not enough. The link to grab the blueprint is in the bio. Go get it.
